_comment: ADVERSARIAL eval. `semantic` questions are STRICTLY lexically-disjoint: zero tokenized overlap with ALL of the target record's lexically-scored fields (title/aliases/description/service/env/tags) — enforced by the honesty guard test, so only embeddings can bridge them. `structured-disambiguation` questions intentionally name a near-sibling service (authnd/authzd) and are exempt. Synthetic data only (public repo).

questions.q: how often do lookups avoid a round trip to disk?
why are users unable to prove who they claim to be?
are customers unable to complete their purchase at the register?
how long before a parcel is ready to hand to the courier?
are the follower copies serving outdated rows?
am I about to blow my uptime target this month?
is the intake stage choking on the incoming firehose?
how long do visitors wait at the gateway before a service answers?
what's our monthly invoice from the hosting provider?
if something breaks overnight, how do I find the person to notify?
why do item listings take forever to appear?
